title: TFactory handback triage contract (v1.0)
description: The typed, versioned triage report TFactory POSTs to AIFactory on a correction hand-back (#283, epic #284). Carries the failure signals (offending tests + AC mapping), the pinned assertion-manifest hash so each correction round provably tests the same bar, and the shared RFC-0001 correlation_key. additionalProperties is permitted so the contract can grow additively without breaking AIFactory's #467 validation gate; removal of any field is a separate, final cutover step.

contract_version.description: Schema version, bumped like RFC-0002 when the shape changes.

aifactory_task_id.description: The AIFactory task this correction targets (task_id, or project:spec).

aifactory.description: The snapshotter's AIFactory envelope: project_id, spec_id, api_url, task_id.

source.description: What produced the hand-back: failing-test triage or a visual-inspection plan.

failing_tests.description: Per offending test: what failed and which AC/file AIFactory must fix.

manifest_hash.description: Hash of the pinned assertion manifest — stable across no-op re-runs so CFactory can confirm round N tested the same assertions as round 1.

correlation_key.description: Shared RFC-0001 correlation key (#249): issue# | tf-<spec_id>. Threads the hand-back and its re-test/completion events together.
